title: Bridge Essay: Domain-specific impairment in metacognitive accuracy following anterior prefront

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dashboard Diagnosis** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Metacognition — self-awareness, self-monitoring, neural correlates of meta-awareness.

**Domain-specific impairment in metacognitive accuracy following anterior prefrontal lesions.**. Brain.. PMID: 25100039. DOI: 10.1093/brain/awu221. Humans have the capacity to evaluate the success of cognitive processes, known as metacognition. Convergent evidence supports arole for anterior prefrontal cortex in metacognitive judgements of perceptual processes. However, it is unknown whether metacognition is aglobal phenomenon, with anterior prefrontal cortex supporting metacognition across domains, or whether it relies on domain-specific neural substrates.
